user.title: Node-RED Native Migrator
user.description:
Set defaults used when running conversion services. You can change these later in integration options.

Recommended first setup:
- Domain filter: leave empty (convert all)
- Output file: /config/automations_migrated.yaml
- Output mode: merge_list

data.default_mode: Output mode (merge_list for automations file, ui_single for UI YAML editor)

init.title: Node-RED Native Migrator options
init.description: Update defaults for later conversion runs.

data.default_mode: Output mode (merge_list for automations file, ui_single for UI YAML editor)
